auth.signInSubtitle: Use email/password or a sign-in provider.

authErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
authErrors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
authErrors.registerNetworkError: Registration failed due to a network or server error.
authErrors.accountCreatedLoginFailed: Account created but login failed. Please sign in manually.
authErrors.providerUnavailable: The selected sign-in provider is not available right now.
authErrors.authFlowCancelled: The sign-in flow was cancelled. Please try again.
authErrors.oauthFailed: Could not sign in with the external provider right now.
authErrors.loginError: Could not sign in right now. Please try again.
authErrors.emailExists: This email address is already in use.

apiErrors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
apiErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
apiErrors.adminNotConfigured: The admin area is not ready yet. Contact support.
apiErrors.adminLoginRequired: You need to sign in as an administrator.
apiErrors.loginRequired: You need to be signed in to make a payment.
apiErrors.downloadLoginRequired: You need to be signed in to download files.
apiErrors.saveProductsFailed: Could not save the product list.
apiErrors.saveCourseAccessFailed: Could not save the access settings.
apiErrors.contentNotReady: The content could not be prepared for payment.
apiErrors.eventNotAvailable: This event is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.courseNotAvailable: This course is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.productNotReady: The product could not be prepared for payment.
apiErrors.productNotAvailable: This product is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.checkoutFailed: Could not start the payment right now. Please try again soon.
apiErrors.productNotDownloadable: This product is not a downloadable file. See the product page in the shop.
apiErrors.noFileAccess: You don't have access to this file yet.
apiErrors.fileFetchFailed: Could not retrieve the file right now.
apiErrors.downloadFailed: Download failed. Please try again soon.
apiErrors.confirmLoginRequired: You need to be signed in to verify payment.
apiErrors.confirmMissingData: We could not verify your payment details.
apiErrors.confirmNotPaid: Your payment is not completed yet.
apiErrors.confirmEmailMismatch: The payment does not match your signed-in account.
apiErrors.confirmCourseMismatch: The payment is for a different course.
apiErrors.confirmFailed: We could not confirm the payment right now. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.runCheckHint: Run a check to verify integrations.
admin.shopProductsHint: Manage files and course products for /shop. Uploaded files are saved to the WordPress media library (max file size depends on your WordPress configuration, typically 2–64 MB).
admin.uploadSizeHint: Max file size depends on WordPress settings (typically 2–64 MB)
admin.priceSavedLocally: Price is saved to Cloudflare KV and used at Stripe checkout.
admin.fetchProductListFailed: Could not fetch the product list.
admin.deployNotConfigured: Deploy is not configured. Set GITHUB_DEPLOY_TOKEN and GITHUB_REPO.

health.wpNotConfigured: WordPress connection is not configured yet.
health.wpAuthMissing: WordPress authentication is missing. Set WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_AUTH_TOKEN or WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_USERNAME + WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_APPLICATION_PASSWORD.
health.wpNotResponding: WordPress is not responding correctly right now.
health.wpConnectFailed: Could not connect to WordPress right now.
health.stripeNotResponding: Stripe is not responding correctly right now.
health.stripeConnectFailed: Could not connect to Stripe right now.
health.oauthNone: No external sign-in providers are configured.

paywall.loggedInAs: You are signed in as {email}, but you don't have access to this {contentKind} yet.
paywall.paymentNotAvailable: Payment is not available yet. Contact the administrator.
paywall.signInToAccess: Sign in or register to purchase this {contentKind}.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Buy digital products and courses.
shop.paymentSuccess: Payment confirmed. The product is now unlocked.
shop.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. No charge was made.
shop.courseAccessDesc: You have purchased the course product. Sign in with the same email address you used for payment.
shop.courseAccessHint: Then go to the course page and open the content. If access is missing, wait a minute and reload the page.
shop.paymentNotAvailable: Payment is not available yet. Contact the administrator.

comments.title: Leave a comment
comments.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
comments.success: Comment submitted! It will appear after review.

s3.publicUrlMissing: S3_PUBLIC_URL is missing. Set the public URL for your bucket.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password.
resetPassword.emailSent: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent.
resetPassword.emailBody: Click the link below to reset your password:
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.resetFailed: Could not reset the password right now. Please try again.
resetPassword.requestFailed: Could not process the request right now.
